name: kiln
description: Multi-model software creation pipeline. From a conversation to deployed code in 8 stages — an interactive brainstorm, then autonomous gauge, research, architecture, build, and validation orchestrated as native Claude Code workflows with Claude and GPT-5.6.

posture.title: Default posture override
posture.description: How Kiln sizes each run. 'auto' lets the Gauge score complexity per run (recommended); 'max' forces the top-rigor posture (every dial at its ceiling); 'fast' forces the leanest posture. Default: auto.

theaterIntensity.title: Theater intensity
theaterIntensity.description: How much of Kiln's persona theater renders — the lore banners, transition lines, and voice. 'full' is the complete show (default); 'light' keeps the status banners but trims the narration; 'off' is bare functional output.
